_comment: Zigha case inputs for the Phase 1 acceptance harness.
_notes: seed_address is the Ethereum-side victim address referenced in the Zigha CFI report.
incident_time set to start-of-day UTC on the confirmed theft date (Oct 9, 2025).
incident_buffer_minutes is 6 hours back to capture activity if the actual unauthorized tx happened slightly before midnight UTC.
Once you populate zigha_expected.json with anchor txs from the CFI report, the verify script will diff against this trace's output.
